title: stellaster damascenus
side_effects: Stellaster damascenus can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and vomiting, as well as allergic reactions, which can manifest as skin rashes and itching. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant may lead to dizziness and lightheadedness due to its potential impact on blood pressure regulation. There is also a risk of renal impairment if the plant is used in combination with certain medications, such as diuretics. Furthermore, improper use of stellaster damascenus can exacerbate existing health conditions, such as diabetes and heart disease.
